news.t: Spotting Trends: 3 Sectors to Consider in Q4

holdings.infoBox: FITE is an equity ETF with a total of 78 individual holdings. The top holdings are Palo Alto Networks stock at 3.18%, Iridium Communications at 2.71%, Planet Labs PBC at 2.48%, TTM Technologies at 2.34%, and BlackBerry at 2.28%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Kensho Future Security ETF (FITE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Kensho Future Security index. The fund tracks an index of US stocks supporting technological innovations in future military and security applications. FITE was launched on Dec 26, 2017 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Spotting Trends: 3 Sectors to Consider in Q4
data.text: Written by: Matthew J. Bartolini, CFA | State Street Global Advisors  As investors scour the landscape for return-generating opportunities, being able to spot trends is a significant advantage.
